# DWG Parse & Write Performance Report

**Date:** March 12, 2026  
**Libraries:** acadrust v0.3.0, ACadSharp v3.4.9 (dxf-rs has no DWG support)  
**Platform:** Windows, Release mode (`opt-level=3`, `lto=thin`)  
**Test data:** DWG files generated by acadrust from mixed and lines-only entity sets

---

## Summary

**acadrust is faster than ACadSharp for both DWG parsing and writing** at all scales, typically 1.5–4.5× faster for parsing and 1.5–2.7× faster for writing.

dxf-rs does not support DWG format.

---

## DWG Parse Results

All times in **milliseconds** (lower is better).

### Small (100 entities)

| Workload | acadrust (ms) | ACadSharp (ms) | Speedup |
|---|---|---|---|
| dwg_mixed | **0.81** | 1.76 | 2.17× |
| dwg_lines | **0.50** | 1.91 | 3.82× |

### Medium (1,000 entities)

| Workload | acadrust (ms) | ACadSharp (ms) | Speedup |
|---|---|---|---|
| dwg_mixed | **3.21** | 8.14 | 2.54× |
| dwg_lines | **3.00** | 11.86 | 3.95× |

### Large (10,000 entities)

| Workload | acadrust (ms) | ACadSharp (ms) | Speedup |
|---|---|---|---|
| dwg_mixed | **19.28** | 92.93 | 4.82× |
| dwg_lines | **24.99** | 68.74 | 2.75× |

### Huge (100,000 entities)

| Workload | acadrust (ms) | ACadSharp (ms) | Speedup |
|---|---|---|---|
| dwg_mixed | **177.84** | 775.50 | 4.36× |
| dwg_lines | **172.97** | 774.46 | 4.48× |

---

## DWG Write Results

All times in **milliseconds** (lower is better).

### Small (100 entities)

| Workload | acadrust (ms) | ACadSharp (ms) | Speedup |
|---|---|---|---|
| dwg_lines | **1.35** | 2.75 | 2.04× |
| dwg_mixed | **0.96** | 5.75 | 5.99× |

### Medium (1,000 entities)

| Workload | acadrust (ms) | ACadSharp (ms) | Speedup |
|---|---|---|---|
| dwg_lines | **3.45** | 10.40 | 3.01× |
| dwg_mixed | **2.77** | 9.82 | 3.54× |

### Large (10,000 entities)

| Workload | acadrust (ms) | ACadSharp (ms) | Speedup |
|---|---|---|---|
| dwg_lines | **18.90** | 27.76 | 1.47× |
| dwg_mixed | **11.69** | 59.98 | 5.13× |

### Huge (100,000 entities)

| Workload | acadrust (ms) | ACadSharp (ms) | Speedup |
|---|---|---|---|
| dwg_lines | **138.77** | 312.87 | 2.25× |
| dwg_mixed | **146.52** | 401.64 | 2.74× |

---

## Observations

- **acadrust** leads in all DWG benchmarks, with the advantage growing at larger scales.
- DWG parse speedup reaches **4.5×** at huge scale — native Rust bit-level parsing outperforms .NET's managed memory model.
- DWG write speedup varies more (1.5–6×), likely because the DWG binary format's object map and handle table generation have different optimization profiles.
- **dxf-rs** has no DWG support — these benchmarks are exclusively acadrust vs ACadSharp.
